records.profile_description: An overt lexical predicate is repeated around negator 唔 to form an A-not-A interrogative constituent, either as a matrix question or as an embedded interrogative complement, as in 食唔食 and 嚟唔嚟. The profile excludes suppletive 有冇, lexical 得唔得 and 可唔可以 profiles, final-未 completion questions, and arbitrary truncation of disyllabic predicates.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for the overt V-唔-V profile; remove suppletive 有冇 from this UUID during compatibility migration and allocate or reuse a separate source-bounded 有冇 interrogative identity

additional_research: The sources support overt A-not-A interrogatives and distinguish special or suppletive negative morphology. The executable suite, however, also assigns the same label to 有冇 + VP. The permanent identity is therefore narrowed to visible V-唔-V structure rather than the current heterogeneous runtime umbrella.

records.rationale: ANotAQuestion is a legitimate linguistic family name, but the current UUID combines canonical V-唔-V forms, embedded interrogatives, and suppletive 有冇 sequences. M4MarkedANotAInterrogative preserves the strongest shared overt structure and makes the negator boundary searchable. Suppletive and lexeme-specific profiles must not inherit its evidence automatically.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations for V-唔-V and 有冇 branches
add exact source-linked focused positives rather than relying on regression snapshots
separate matrix and embedded distribution where their outer licensing differs
define licensed disyllabic and truncated predicate patterns without a free deletion rule
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An implementation aggregate over an action predicate followed either by quantified nominal material, as in 寫三個字, or by a duration-question expression, as in 等幾耐. The wrapper does not establish a stative predicate or one Cantonese construction shared by object quantity and duration questions.
records.status_recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; represent quantified objects through ordinary argument and classifier-NP structure and duration questions through independently typed temporal or measure structure

additional_research: The positive tests are 寫三個字 and 等幾耐. The sources analyze 三個字 as nominal quantity material and 幾耐 as duration-question material. Neither path supports a stative component or a single action-stative construction.

source_terms.term: nominal continuation in 寫三個字

records.rationale: The legacy label assigns a stative analysis where the executable positives contain either a quantified object or a wh-duration expression. The runtime grouping is useful only as historical compatibility metadata. It should cease competing for linguistic promotion and decompose into independently supported object, quantity, predicate, and duration structures.
unresolved_blockers: map each runtime branch to its independently typed child structures
remove stative terminology from public diagnostics
preserve object-versus-duration ambiguity only where independently licensed
complete compatibility migration before changing emitted legacy labels

records.profile_description: An overt subject followed by lexical 知, optionally preceded by 唔, and a visible clausal or interrogative complement, as in 我知佢唔嚟, 我知如果佢去我就去, and 我唔知佢嚟唔嚟. The profile does not generalize to every cognition verb, nominal content, reported thought, or stance-marking construction.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending under a lexeme-specific name; obtain exact external support for 知 complement classes and reconcile the runtime before any promotion track

additional_research: The grammar synopsis supports cognition verbs with clausal complements but does not license every cognition lexeme with every clause type. All current positives are built around 知 or 唔知, so the permanent identity is narrowed to that lexical profile while reported-thought and stance constructions remain contrastive.

records.rationale: CognitionContentFrame is too broad and uses the vague head Frame. The executable profile is consistently lexical 知 or 唔知 plus visible clausal content. ZiClausalComplementClause names the actual predicate and complement type while preventing unsupported transfer to 覺得, 諗住, reported thought, stance particles, or nominal objects.
unresolved_blockers: verify an exact source for 知 with declarative, conditional, and embedded A-not-A complements
record exact runtime code locations
separate lexical complement selection from generic recursive clause parsing
add focused source-linked positive and negative cases
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An implementation wrapper over short material following 覺得, including 有, 係, 唔係, and subject-plus-係 strings. These surfaces may involve aspectual VP ellipsis, contextual object omission, existential or possessive predication, copular structure, or response-particle material and are not established as one Cantonese complement-ellipsis fragment construction.
records.status_recommendation: migrate to parser_heuristic after compatibility migration; allocate or reuse separate language identities only for independently sourced VP ellipsis, object omission, and response-particle or copular profiles

additional_research: The sources distinguish aspectual 有/冇 VP ellipsis, contextual object omission after 鍾意, and 係/唔係 response-particle material. The tests instead place 覺得有, 覺得係, 覺得唔係, and 覺得佢係 under one label, which does not establish a shared ellipsis mechanism or fragment boundary.

source_terms.term: VP movement and ellipsis with 有/冇

records.rationale: The current record conflates several short complements whose analyses differ fundamentally. Some contain an overt subject, some may be complete response-particle expressions, and the 有 example is not licensed by the same evidence as 係 or 唔係. The UUID should therefore preserve only the compatibility wrapper and leave linguistic promotion to independently bounded successors.
unresolved_blockers: determine the actual runtime analysis of each positive case
separate response-particle 係 from copular 係
separate aspectual 有/冇 VP ellipsis from existential or possessive 有
test contextual object omission independently of proposition omission
complete compatibility migration and successor UUID allocation

records.profile_description: A predicate contains an overt completion, result, or aspect marker such as 完 or 咗 and is followed by final 未, optionally with an overt object and final particle, as in 食完飯未, 食咗飯未, and 食咗未. The profile excludes the current bare-VP + 未 branch, A-not-A questions, scalar questions, and any inference that structural recognition validates predicate-object compatibility.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for the visibly completion- or aspect-marked profile; quarantine bare VP + 未 until independently sourced and keep semantic selection review separate from construction recognition

additional_research: The checked source explicitly attributes the completion reading to visible result, completion, or aspect marking. The executable suite nevertheless includes bare 食飯未 under the same label. The permanent identity is therefore narrowed to the overt-marker profile without claiming that unsupported bare forms are universally ungrammatical.

source_terms.term: completion question with visible completion/result particle or aspect marker

records.rationale: CompletionQuestion is defensible as a semantic description but hides the overt markers that provide its actual source authorization. AspectMarkedMeiCompletionQuestion makes the formal boundary explicit and prevents the unsupported bare-VP route from inheriting the evidence. Predicate-object compatibility remains a separate semantic-selection concern.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations for aspect-marked and bare-VP branches
replace regression-only positives with exact source-linked focused cases
resolve the status of bare VP + 未 without treating missing source support as universal ungrammaticality
expand completion and result marker coverage conservatively
complete corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation
